name: Commercial Lending Solutions
description_short: Commercial Lending Solutions provides commercial real estate loans and alternative financing for businesses in Charlotte, NC, specializing in scenarios where traditional banks decline.
description_long:
Commercial Lending Solutions (CLS) is a Charlotte, North Carolina-based commercial real estate lender operating from 2303 West Morehead Street, Suite 200. The company positions itself as an alternative to traditional bank lending, emphasizing a personal approach to commercial financing decisions. They serve both business owners and real estate investors seeking competitive market-rate financing for commercial properties and investment purposes.

CLS offers a diverse range of commercial lending products including bridge-to-permanent loans (described as their most popular offering), small balance commercial programs, investment property loans, fix-and-flip financing, and specialized programs for foreign investors. The company also operates a broker referral program and works with a network of underwriters to provide flexible financing structures. Their stated approach includes pre-approval before property offers and solutions for borrowing needs that fall outside traditional bank credit models.

The company differentiates itself through relationship-focused service and access to diverse underwriting networks. CLS emphasizes that they can approve borrowers before property offers are made and claim to find lending solutions when traditional banks cannot. They position themselves against larger institutional lenders by highlighting personalized service and expertise in commercial real estate investment property selection and profit projection.

While CLS presents competitive advantages in niche commercial lending, the website provides limited transparency regarding specific loan terms, interest rate ranges, approval timelines, or borrower qualification requirements. No information is disclosed about licensing, NMLS numbers, or regulatory oversight. The company operates in a specific geographic market (Charlotte) with no mention of nationwide lending capacity, and their marketing relies heavily on relationship-building rather than transparent product specifications.
address: 2303 W Morehead St STE 200, Charlotte, NC 28208

company_info.headquarters: 2303 W Morehead St STE 200, Charlotte, NC 28208

pros: Specializes in approving borrowers who don't qualify for traditional bank financing
Pre-approval available before property offer is made, accelerating deal timelines
Diverse underwriting network provides flexible and competitive loan structures
Offers specialized programs including fix-and-flip loans and foreign investor financing
Personal relationship-focused approach contrasting with large institutional lenders
Provides commercial real estate investment guidance and profit projection assistance
Bridge-to-permanent loan products for transitional financing needs
cons: Website lacks specific interest rate ranges, terms, or APR information for any loan products
No disclosed loan amounts, minimums, or maximum financing thresholds
Limited transparency on borrower qualification criteria, credit requirements, or approval timelines
No NMLS number, licensing information, or regulatory compliance details provided
Geographic focus on Charlotte, NC with no indication of nationwide or multi-state lending availability
best_for: Real estate investors seeking bridge or fix-and-flip financing when banks decline
Commercial property owners needing alternative financing outside standard bank credit models
Foreign investors purchasing U.S. commercial real estate properties
Business owners requiring pre-approval financing before making property offers
diagnosis: Commercial Lending Solutions is best suited for commercial real estate investors and business borrowers who have been declined by traditional banks or require alternative lending structures. Primary caveat: the company provides minimal transparency on rates, terms, and qualification criteria on their public website, requiring direct contact via phone (843-424-3010) to obtain specific loan information.
services: Foreign investor commercial real estate loans
Profit projection analysis for income-producing properties
